narrative:
Tate Township D (precinct in Clermont County) has 1,154 registered voters, with 52.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.9 percentage points.
